title: SPSP 2027 Annual Convention Call for Submissions
description: The Society for Personality and Social Psychology has opened the call for submissions for the SPSP 2027 Annual Convention. The call invites submissions for podium presentations, posters, and roundtable unconferences, offering an international opportunity for scholars, students, and early-career researchers working in personality and social psychology.
organization: Society for Personality and Social Psychology

title: Submission title: Call for Papers: Special Issue on Social Status
description: Social Psychology Quarterly invites submissions for a special issue on social status. The call welcomes empirical and theoretical articles or research notes on how status is determined, how it affects individuals, groups, and society, and how it relates to inequality, power, emotions, identity, conflict, decision-making, workplaces, classrooms, and methodological advances in the study of status.
organization: Social Psychology Quarterly / American Sociological Association

title: Call for Papers: The Social Psychology of Third Parties in Intergroup Conflicts
description: The journal Social Psychology invites submissions for a special issue on the role of third parties in intergroup conflicts. The issue welcomes theoretical and empirical contributions on how actors not directly involved in conflicts may shape conflict dynamics through mediation, commentary, allyship, sanctioning, bystander involvement, reconciliation, collective memory, and social justice.
organization: Social Psychology / European Association of Social Psychology
